content.problemStatement:
- Let's see one example to demonstrate what we have studied previously. We will demonstrate the usage of append using ofstream.

- In this example, we have a data.txt file that already contains some text.\
The program shown below is already populated and is designed to append new lines to this file without removing the existing content.\
Each time the program is run, the new lines will be added at the end of the file. This is useful when you want to maintain a continuous log or record of data over time.

**Don't forget to check `data.txt` as you run the code.**
